testcase.name: test_cap_3_means_4th_is_429

skipped.message: Turnstile is strictly enforced (iter71) — /api/requests requires a valid token. End-to-end IP rate-limit gets exercised via frontend with the live widget. The PUT->config wiring is verified by the admin endpoint tests.

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration33_admin_ratelimit_sitecopy.py:94: Turnstile is strictly enforced (iter71) — /api/requests requires a valid token. End-to-end IP rate-limit gets exercised via frontend with the live widget. The PUT->config wiring is verified by the admin endpoint tests.

testcase.name: test_referral_fields_persist_for_results_page

skipped.message: Turnstile strict mode blocks server-side POST /api/requests. Field persistence is verified by frontend Playwright + DB inspection.
